prompt: Photoreal high-end 3D animated feature film, cinematic anamorphic look. FIGHTER A, the Sponge Fighter: a bright-yellow rectangular kitchen-sponge creature with porous sponge texture and holes along his sides, big round blue eyes, two big front buck teeth, skinny noodle arms and legs, wearing a small flowing RED CAPE, aviator goggles, white karate sparring gloves, plain blue shorts and black shoes. His face is set in fierce determined concentration. His powers: lightning-fast karate, blowing giant glistening soap bubbles, and sponge resilience where impacts squash him flat like an accordion and he springs back unharmed. FIGHTER B, the Green Gladiator: a colossal green-skinned muscle giant, heavy scowling brow, shaggy dark hair, a bronze spiked pauldron strapped on his left shoulder, leather bracers on both forearms, bold white tribal war paint striped across his chest and face, ragged dark-gray shorts, barefoot, three times taller than the sponge. He wields a massive two-handed STONE WAR HAMMER. His powers: earth-shattering strength, a two-handed thunderclap that fires a visible ring-shaped shockwave, skyscraper leaps into ground-pound impacts, and a rage mode where his war paint glows green and his muscles swell. SETTING: an ancient stone ruins arena on a mountain plateau at storm dusk, heavy rain, rain-slicked flagstones with puddles reflecting lightning, mist rolling between broken pillars, warm fire glow in the distance. STYLE: teal-and-orange cinematic grade, cool blue storm shadows with warm amber rim light, volumetric rain and mist, film grain, shallow depth of field on close-ups. Intense but clean PG action: absolutely no blood, no gore, no injuries shown; impacts read as water spray, mist bursts, shockwaves and sparks. No text, no HUD, no interface graphics anywhere. No dialogue; thunder, rain and deep cinematic impacts in the audio. SCENE 5 of 5, the finale (15 seconds), shot list: SCENE OPENS exactly on this composition: low wide shot, the Sponge Fighter kneeling in the foreground looking up, the glowing Green Gladiator high in the storm sky above with both fists overhead, lightning behind him. 0-3s: the gladiator descends like a meteor trailing rain and green light; the sponge plants his feet, inhales enormously, chest swelling, and blows one GIGANTIC glistening rainbow soap bubble straight upward. 3-8s: extreme slow motion: the gladiator's descending fists meet the bubble; its surface stretches and warps, suspended raindrops hanging around them, green glow refracting through the soap film; then the bubble DETONATES in a spherical burst of glowing mist and light that fills the frame. 8-12s: the shockwave hurls the gladiator down; he crashes flat on his back, cratering the flagstones, water geysering; he strains to rise on one arm, trembles, and collapses back, out cold in the rain, chest rising and falling. 12-15s: the exhausted Sponge Fighter rises shakily to his feet, goggles askew, cape torn at the edge, and raises one gloved fist in a weary victory pose as the rain begins to thin and warm light breaks through the clouds; the camera pulls up and back into the sky, both fighters small in the ruined arena. FINAL FRAME: high wide pull-back of the arena, the sponge standing with fist raised beside the fallen giant, golden light breaking through the storm.
